name: globalprotocol-old-world-order-wasm-as
description: AssemblyScript WASM source for Global Protocol: Old World Order (Variant B / core WASM).
notes: build        → outputs Content/mod.wasm (core WASM, active entrypoint in mod.json)
build:debug  → outputs with source maps for WASM debugger
Binary format: core WASM (magic 01 00 00 00). Requires no special engine flags.
mod.json does NOT need enableComponentRuntime for this variant.
To activate this variant instead of .NET WASI, run: npm run build
To activate .NET WASI variant: dotnet publish from Content/wasm-dotnet/
